case_title: EVANGELINA D. CASTRO VS. AIR SERV CORPORATION, A GEORGIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, EVANGELINA D. AS TO DEFENDANT AIR SERV CORPORATION, A GEORGIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, EVANGELINA D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIR SERV CORPORATION, A GEORGIA CORPORATION $3,573.76 PRINCIPAL, $25.18 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,803.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, EVANGELINA D. AS TO DEFENDANT AIR SERV CORPORATION, A GEORGIA CORPORATION
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECVD CHECK FROM STATE OF CA
